Order Retractor Lite 31 Hardware for Professional Display Solutions

Get professional-grade retractor banner stand hardware designed for trade shows, retail displays, and promotional events. This lightweight aluminum construction provides reliable display setup with professional durability for repeated use.

Professional Display Features

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for portability
  • Available in black or silver finish options
  • Two swivel feet provide stable display positioning
  • Shock cord pole system for quick setup and breakdown
  • Snap rail top attachment with banner tape bottom mounting
  • Compact 32" W x 84" H x 15" D display dimensions
  • Lightweight 6lb construction for easy transport

This professional banner stand hardware accommodates custom banners up to 32" wide and extends to 84" height for maximum display impact. The aluminum construction ensures durability while maintaining portability for trade show and event use.

Retractor Lite 31 Hardware Questions & Answers

What banner sizes work with the Retractor Lite 31 hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners up to 32" wide and 84" tall. We recommend 31" x 83" for optimal fit and appearance. Custom banner sizes are available within these maximum dimensions.

Is the banner included with the hardware?

No, the banner is sold separately. This allows you to order exactly the banner material and design you need for your specific display application. Our customer service team can help you select compatible banner options.

How much does the retractor hardware weigh?

The complete hardware unit weighs just 6 pounds, making it easy to transport between trade shows and events. The lightweight aluminum construction provides durability without excessive weight.

What finish options are available?

The retractor hardware is available in black or silver finish options. Both provide professional appearance and coordinate with most banner designs and branding requirements.

How difficult is setup and breakdown?

Setup is designed to be quick and tool-free. The shock cord pole system eliminates loose parts, and the swivel feet adjust for stable positioning. Most users can complete setup in under 2 minutes.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

The hardware is designed primarily for indoor use at trade shows, retail locations, and events. For outdoor applications, consider wind conditions and use appropriate banner materials designed for exterior display.

What are the storage dimensions?

When disassembled, the hardware stores in a compact configuration. The base dimensions are 32" W x 15" D, and the pole sections store inside the base unit for convenient transport.

Do you offer volume pricing for multiple units?

Yes, volume pricing is available for customers ordering multiple retractor hardware units. Contact our customer service team for pricing on quantities of 5 or more units.
